title: Memory Function Algorithm for the 0/1 Knapsack Problem
description: A flowchart illustrating the recursive, memoized approach to solving the Knapsack Problem, showing how subproblems are solved and stored to avoid redundant calculations.
elements: Check if solution exists in memory table
relationships: Start leads to Check if solution exists
If solution exists, leads to Return value
If solution does not exist, leads to Solve subproblem
Solve subproblem leads to Store result
Store result leads to Return value
